title: Implement and monitor a horticultural crop harvesting program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement and monitor a horticultural crop harvesting program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan for harvesting

pcs.text: Assess and record crop maturity and quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and record crop maturity and quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and record crop maturity and quality.

pcs.text: Undertake pre-harvest treatments for control and eradication of pests
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake pre-harvest treatments for control and eradication of pests?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake pre-harvest treatments for control and eradication of pests.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine harvesting resource requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine harvesting resource requirements.

pcs.text: Estimate best time to harvest crop
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate best time to harvest crop?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate best time to harvest crop.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan for harvesting

elements.title: Coordinate the harvest strategy

pcs.text: Implement harvesting operations according to customer requirements, weather, equipment and staff availability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement harvesting operations according to customer requirements, weather, equipment and staff availability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement harvesting operations according to customer requirements, weather, equipment and staff availability.

pcs.text: Coordinate and monitor equipment operation for maximum efficiency and effectiveness
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Coordinate and monitor equipment operation for maximum efficiency and effectiveness?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Coordinate and monitor equipment operation for maximum efficiency and effectiveness.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Consider the environmental implications of the crop harvesting program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider the environmental implications of the crop harvesting program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider the environmental implications of the crop harvesting program.

pcs.text: Incorporate sustainability and biosecurity practices into the crop harvesting program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Incorporate sustainability and biosecurity practices into the crop harvesting program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incorporate sustainability and biosecurity practices into the crop harvesting program.

pcs.text: Document the crop harvesting program and schedule of activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document the crop harvesting program and schedule of activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document the crop harvesting program and schedule of activities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Coordinate the harvest strategy

elements.title: Complete harvest operation

pcs.text: Communicate the crop harvesting program and schedule of activities to staff
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate the crop harvesting program and schedule of activities to staff?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate the crop harvesting program and schedule of activities to staff.

pcs.text: Locate storage resources to meet program requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate storage resources to meet program requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate storage resources to meet program requirements.

pcs.text: Determine strategies for drying crops where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine strategies for drying crops where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine strategies for drying crops where necessary.

pcs.text: Monitor work to ensure that crop is graded, packed and stored according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor work to ensure that crop is graded, packed and stored according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor work to ensure that crop is graded, packed and stored according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Evaluate harvesting operations and outcomes against crop harvesting program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate harvesting operations and outcomes against crop harvesting program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate harvesting operations and outcomes against crop harvesting program.

pcs.text: Provide feedback on performance to personnel under supervision
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide feedback on performance to personnel under supervision?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide feedback on performance to personnel under supervision.

pcs.text: Review and document crop quality, pre-harvest treatments and outcomes of harvest to identify opportunities for improvements in performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review and document crop quality, pre-harvest treatments and outcomes of harvest to identify opportunities for improvements in performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and document crop quality, pre-harvest treatments and outcomes of harvest to identify opportunities for improvements in performance.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete harvest operation

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
